testcase.name: Upload 500 MB via JFrog CLI multipart
Bearer token expiry at chunk boundary [PIPE-458]
testcase.failure: HTTP 403 Forbidden at chunk: 7 / 8 bytes transferred: 56 MB of 64 MB token age at failure: 18m 02s hint: JFROG_CLI_TOKEN_REFRESH env var missing from agent-01

testcase.name: Cross-repo dedup timeout under load [PIPE-476]
testcase.failure: DeduplicationTimeout: request took 30.4s, threshold is 30s at: DeduplicationService.resolveCollision() line 412 context: k8s pod under concurrent load (3 parallel uploads) previous failure: build #1242 (same root cause)
